evaluation_goals: Understand the public scope without reading the private runtime repository.
See the strongest contract, review, and release-evidence surfaces quickly.
Verify that the repo behaves like a maintained OSS contract surface rather than a bulk export.
public_value_claims: The repo publishes a real public contract surface for CapsuleOS and validator-facing artifacts.
The repo exposes both human-readable and machine-readable evidence for external review.
The repo makes scope, portability posture, and published-vs-deferred boundaries explicit.
The repo makes claim-to-evidence traceability explicit instead of leaving reviewers to infer it from scattered files.
The repo makes public example coverage explicit instead of leaving reviewers to guess which fixtures exercise which contracts.
The repo makes public maintainer workflow and release posture explicit instead of relying on implied maintenance behavior.
The repo makes additive, deprecated, and breaking public-change posture explicit instead of leaving change discipline implied across scattered docs.
non_claims: This packet does not claim to expose the full private N1Hub runtime.
This packet does not claim that every upstream domain is public.
This packet does not replace the stronger underlying docs, schemas, OpenAPI, or release evidence.
